title: AARO Historical Review Volume 2 — Status Overdue
detail: AARO's Historical Record Report Volume 2, which was expected to cover post-2023 whistleblower claims and congressional referrals in greater depth, remains unreleased as of March 2025. Volume 1 (released March 2024) drew heavy criticism from congressional UAP advocates for concluding 'no empirical evidence' of extraterrestrial technology. The delay fuels speculation about internal disagreements over findings, particularly given the change in AARO leadership after Kirkpatrick's departure.
